name: hostel-management-system
description: MERN Stack Hostel Management System - Student, Room, Fees & Complaint Management

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace client
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --workspace client && npm run type-check --workspace server
scripts.format: npm run format --workspace client && npm run format --workspace server
scripts.clean: npm run clean --workspace server && npm run clean --workspace client

author: Hostel Management Team
